title: New UK Prime Minister Burnham Promises Hope and Change. The Hurdles Are High.
summary_full: Britain’s new prime minister, Andy Burnham, promised policies that would give average Britons financial “breathing space.” His opponents are already doling out criticism.
summary_public: Britain’s new prime minister, Andy Burnham, promised policies that would give average Britons financial “breathing space.” His opponents are already doling out criticism.
